text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It's the last day of summer camp,<n>and T.M. Opera
O is standing on the<n>beach...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha! A perfect victory!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I dub this season my victorious<n>summer!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: For some reason declaring victory.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Oh? That's an inquisitive face,<n>Trainer.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Why is it that I'm so content? I can<n>see the
question written plainly on<n>you.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My elation... is due to a major<n>achievement of
mine this summer.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: What do you think it was?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Yes, that is true. Training with theolder generation certainly was a boon.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: But I have gained something even<n>more impactful.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hehehe... It is information, my deartrainer. Information.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
By spending time with the racers who<n>came
before, I was able confirm their<n>true strength with
my own eyes.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Spe's latent power, Grass's<n>intelligence...
Knowledge is in the<n>details, you see.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And my all-seeing Overlord's eye has<n>already laid
all their abilities bare!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
How will they act in the time of our<n>inevitable
clash? I can already see it<n>clearly.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You will lose, Spe! You will lose,<n>Grass! I already
have the previous<n>generation in the palm of my
hand.<n>Haaah ha ha!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
She was not present, so I have no<n>idea! Haaah ha
ha!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She's not really concerned with the<n>specifics of
what she's saying...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: At any rate, my preparations are set.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Let us return to the academy so that<n>we may
advance our pieces toward<n>the grand game that is
the Arima<n>Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
That will serve as the arena of her<n>first major
skirmish against the<n>senior racers.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We have four months. It's time for<n>T.M. Opera O to
dash down the path<n>of the Overlord!
